_patch_meta.description: Active Session B findings for special-status terms in peace (#117) and soul (#182). Ensures theological anchor and phase2_enrichment terms surface at Session B DataPrep. Two CC investigation flags for peace registry anomalies.

record.finding: Peace (#117) carries 15 terms with status=extracted_theological_anchor (818 active verses). These are divine names, titles, and eternal/hosts vocabulary — YHWH-Shalom, LORD of Hosts (H6635A/B, 292 verses), El Shaddai (H7706, 48 verses), Adonai (H0136, 187 verses), El Olam (H5769G/H, 273 verses), El Elyon (H5943/H5946, 14 verses), YHWH-Nissi, YHWH-Tsidkenu, YHWH-Tsidkenu (H6664H, 2 verses), sabaoth (G4519, 2 verses). Deliberately excluded from VCB — no verse_context records exist for these terms. Their active verses remain unflagged by design. Session B DataPrep must include these terms as theological frame context for the peace word analysis. Verse records are accessible via wa_verse_records joined through wa_term_inventory. See word_registry.notes for full term list.

operations.description: Session B finding — peace (#117): theological anchor terms must be surfaced at DataPrep

record.finding: Soul (#182) carries 1 term with status=phase2_enrichment: H5317 (nophet/honey, 5 active verses). Pro 27:7 — one who is full loathes honey; to one who is hungry everything bitter is sweet — encodes the appetite dimension of nephesh through honey as archetype metaphor. Deliberately excluded from VCB — no verse_context records exist. Active verses remain unflagged by design. Decision carried forward from prior Session B. Session B DataPrep must include this term as contextual support for understanding the soul's appetitive dimension. Verses: Psa 19:10, Pro 5:3, Pro 24:13, Pro 27:7, Song 4:11.

operations.description: Session B finding — soul (#182): phase2_enrichment term H5317 must be surfaced at DataPrep

record.description: H3070 (YHWH-Yireh, YHWH-Jireh) registration anomaly: owner_registry field points to experience (#58) but this term is registered as extracted_theological_anchor in peace (#117). Requires CC investigation to confirm correct owner registry assignment before Session B begins on peace. If owner should be peace, update mti_terms.owning_registry accordingly.

operations.description: CC investigation flag — H3070 owner registry mismatch: experience vs peace

record.description: H3068G (YHWH/Yahweh) registration anomaly: owner_registry = NULL, active_verse_count = 0. This is the primary divine name; its absence of an owner registry and zero active verses is structurally unusual. May be a registration placeholder. Requires CC investigation before Session B begins on peace to confirm whether this is intentional (placeholder, handled via H3068 variants elsewhere) or an incomplete registration.

operations.description: CC investigation flag — H3068G no owner registry and zero verses
